Dairy-Free Restaurants in Cocoa Beach

Most of the restaurants with dairy-free options in Cocoa Beach grade well: 8 of 13 hold an A, led by SUBWAY #36536 at a perfect 100/100. Every listing below carries its latest Florida health grade.

13 dairy-free restaurants

  • A 100 D
    DIRTY BIRDS TIKI BAR & GRILL Other ★ 4.8 (1556) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County DFKeto +1 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 100 L
    LA CATRINA MEXICAN RESTAURANT Mexican ★ 4.4 (3237) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County VegGF +3 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 100 S
    SQUID LIPS Seafood ★ 4.2 (3706) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County VegGF +5 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 100 S
    SUBWAY #36536 Bakery ★ 3.8 (6175) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County DF Inspected Aug 2025
  • A 98 G
    GREGORY'S STEAK & SEAFOOD GRILL Seafood ★ 4.1 (1118) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County VegGF +5 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 95 Q
    Q'S CRACKIN' CRAB American ★ 4.2 (1734) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County GFDF +3 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 95 S
    SLOW & LOW BBQ Seafood ★ 4.3 (2128) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County GFDF +3 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 91 S
    SIAMORCHID COCOA BEACH Chinese ★ 4.4 (1047) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County VeganVeg +5 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • B 87 J
    JAZZY'S MAINELY LOBSTER & SEAFOOD INC. Seafood ★ 4.5 (4031) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County GFDF +4 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • B 86 R
    ROCK THE GUAC Other ★ 4.4 (1945) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County VeganVeg +4 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • B 84 M
    MEXICO'S GRILL Mexican ★ 4.6 (2116) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County VegGF +3 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • C 79 C
    COCOA BEACH FISH CAMP GRILL Other ★ 4.4 (2673) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County VeganVeg +5 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • D 61 P
    PITA PARADISE Mediterranean ★ 4.7 (2236) Cocoa Beach · Brevard County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected Mar 2026
